_comment:
DOCUMENTED CASE — partial extraction + high-confidence violation. ABV and bottler address not found (may be on unsubmitted panel). GWS header is definitively wrong (R-GW-03, high confidence).

Expected verdict: NONCOMPLIANT (the definitive R-GW-03 error drives the verdict).
Expected errors:   [R-GW-03]
Expected warnings: [R-DS-03 (ABV not found), R-DS-06 (bottler address not found)]

KNOWN LIMITATION (ADR-011 §'Partial extraction with high-confidence violation'):
The NONCOMPLIANT verdict is correct — R-GW-03 is a definitive violation. However, the caller
must surface the warnings alongside the error. A user who fixes only R-GW-03 may not
realize the label could not be fully verified. Production handling of this mixed-verdict
case is deferred; see ADR-011 for the design note.

gws_body.value: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
